name: Curry Without Tears
recipeInstructions:
1. You can make this curry with any meat, poultry, fish, or vegetables of your choice.
2. Heat the red curry sauce in a pan.
3. Add the bamboo shoots and cook for three to four minutes.
4. Add the diced chicken and lime leaves.
5. Cook until the chicken is cooked through.
(If using beef, add it first and cook until tender before adding the bamboo shoots.)
